name: fleet-health
description: Generic read-only fleet health workflow for a first MeshClaw run. It collects fleet status, service findings, security posture, and a non-destructive autoheal plan.

steps.title: Collect fleet overview
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would collect monitored fleet state.

steps.title: Audit failed or restarting services
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would audit service failures across the fleet.

steps.title: Collect read-only security and hygiene snapshot
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would collect security, hygiene, and log evidence without mutating hosts.

steps.title: Build non-destructive autoheal plan
steps.dry_run_note: Dry-run only: would generate safe repair candidates but not apply them.

steps.title: Gate safe remediation apply
steps.dry_run_note: Applying even safe remediation requires explicit operator approval.
